overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic dystopian city at night. The player moves from an open intersection past a futuristic car, under massive concrete overpasses, past construction workers, and into narrow industrial corridors beneath elevated highways, with towering buildings and neon advertisements visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with wet streets

events.description: player moves away from the parked car and begins crossing the street
approaching the large intersection with the illuminated tower building ahead

agents.ego_description: moving away from a parked futuristic car and crossing the wet asphalt street toward the intersection

entered.detail: sleek black vehicle with red interior lighting and Get In prompt visible on screen
tall brutalist concrete building with large white 06 signage illuminated on the facade
tall illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics and Japanese text
white truck parked at the far side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the player standing next to a sleek black futuristic car at night. The player moves away from the vehicle and crosses the wet asphalt street toward a large intersection dominated by a towering building marked with 06. The area is illuminated by streetlights and digital billboards, with reflective wet pavement suggesting recent rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: turns right and enters the covered area beneath the massive concrete overpass
passes a red stop sign at the corner and continues under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and walking along the sidewalk beneath the massive concrete overpass structure

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow pants and dark top walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive elevated highway with red warning lights along the edge and concrete support pillars
octagonal stop sign mounted on a pole at the street corner
angled concrete wall with colorful graffiti art and red painted trim

segments.scene_description: The player turns right at the intersection and enters a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive elevated highway. The environment becomes darker with artificial lighting from street lamps. The player passes a red stop sign and walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered retaining wall, encountering a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with industrial barriers approaching construction zone

events.description: moves from the sidewalk onto the street level to continue forward
approaching group of construction workers near industrial containers and stairs

agents.ego_description: walking along the street level past parked vehicles and industrial barriers, approaching a construction area with workers visible ahead

entered.detail: sleek black sports car parked along the curb with reflective surfaces
large red industrial shipping container near the concrete stairs
green illuminated street sign reading San Amaro mounted on the concrete wall
metal safety barrier with yellow paint along the upper walkway

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the sidewalk onto the street level, walking past a parked black sports car. The street runs parallel to the elevated highway above, with industrial elements like shipping containers and safety railings becoming visible. A green street sign indicates the location as San Amaro as the player approaches a construction area.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction site entrance with concrete stairs and industrial containers

events.description: enters the narrow construction area beneath the overpass with workers present
passes close by construction workers, temporarily blocking the view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a group of construction workers and entering the narrow industrial passage beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow hard hat and safety vest standing on the concrete stairs
construction worker facing away from camera near the containers

entered.detail: set of concrete stairs leading up to a doorway in the industrial wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow construction zone beneath the overpass, passing three construction workers wearing yellow hard hats and safety vests. The area features concrete stairs leading to an upper level, industrial containers, and yellow safety railings. The space becomes increasingly enclosed as the player moves deeper under the elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor beneath elevated highways with warehouses

events.description: enters the long enclosed industrial corridor with blue warehouse building on the right
industrial cooling towers with red warning lights and steam become visible through the haze ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow industrial corridor beneath massive concrete overpasses, passing industrial buildings and infrastructure with no other people present

entered.detail: long blue corrugated metal warehouse building running along the right side of the path
large cylindrical industrial tanks with red warning lights on top emitting steam smoke
gothic-style tower with illuminated spire visible in the distant background
multiple large illuminated advertising screens on distant buildings showing colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a long, narrow industrial corridor completely enclosed by massive concrete overpass structures overhead. A blue industrial warehouse runs along the right side, while in the distance, large industrial cooling towers with red lights emit steam into the hazy night air. Digital billboards illuminate the far end of the corridor, and the environment is devoid of people, creating a desolate industrial atmosphere beneath the city's elevated infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, rain-slicked city intersection into the desolate, enclosed depths of an industrial underpass. It begins beside a sleek black futuristic car, moving across wet asphalt toward a towering building marked with 06 under the glow of digital billboards. As the camera turns right, the scene shifts into a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive highway, passing a graffiti-covered wall and a lone pedestrian before descending to street level in San Amaro. The environment then tightens as the camera enters a construction zone filled with workers in yellow hard hats and safety vests, moving deeper under the concrete overpass. Finally, the space transforms into a long, narrow industrial corridor flanked by a blue warehouse, leading toward distant cooling towers emitting steam into the hazy night air.
